title: Berisfords 3501 Double Satin Ribbon, Bridal White, 25 mm

description: Product Description A classic and versatile ribbon made from 100 percent polyester yarn. Berisfords double faced satin ribbon is the core product in the essentials collection. Berisfords ribbons are designed and manufactured in Great Britain. Your guarantee of quality and style. Box Contains 1 x Ribbon Roll
